title: Fort Vasai
tagline: Fort Vasai — heritage city of Maharashtra

overview.short: Fort Vasai (Vasai killa in Marathi, Fort Vasai in English) is a ruined fort in the town of Vasai (Bassein), Konkan Division, Maharashtra, India.
overview.description: Fort Vasai (Vasai killa in Marathi, Fort Vasai in English) is a ruined fort in the town of Vasai (Bassein), Konkan Division, Maharashtra, India. The structure was formally christened as the Fort of St. Sebastian in the Indo-Portuguese era. The fort is a monument of national importance and is protected by the Archaeological Survey of India.

topPlaces.name: Vadavali
topPlaces.description: Vadavali is a village in the Palghar district of Maharashtra, India. It is located in the Talasari taluka.

topPlaces.name: Diocese of Vasai
topPlaces.description: The Roman Catholic Diocese of Vasai (Latin: Vasaien(sis)) is a diocese located in the city of Vasai in the ecclesiastical province of Bombay in India.

topPlaces.name: Dongri Fort
topPlaces.description: The Dongri Fort, or the Dongri Hill Fort, locally known as the Janjire Dhavari Fort, is a fort in Mumbai, India. It is located in the Dongri area.

topPlaces.name: Ulhas River
topPlaces.description: The Ulhas River is a west-flowing river in Maharashtra, India. It is in the Thane, Raigad, and Pune districts of that state.

topPlaces.name: Naigaon
topPlaces.description: Naigaon is a village in Palghar district of Indian State of Maharashtra. It is linked by the Versova Bridge /Ghodbunder Bridge to Navghar, which is connected from the east side of the settlement by the National Highway.

topPlaces.name: Bhayandar
topPlaces.description: Bhayandar, also spelled as Bhaindar or Bhayander, is a suburb located in the western suburbs of Mumbai and the northern most suburb of the island on the western side, near the Vasai Creek. It has a large Marathi, Aagri, Koli, and mixed-community population.

topPlaces.name: Dongri
topPlaces.description: Dongri is a port city in the Mira-Bhayandar municipality of Thane district, situated just north of Gorai, Mumbai. The word 'Dungaree' (worker's overalls worn in Britain) has its origin in Dongri due to this genre of garment monolithically being manufactured from textile sectors within the confines of the city.

topPlaces.name: Manickpur
topPlaces.description: Manickpur is a small village in the Vasai (Bassein) township of the Palghar district in the Maharashtra, India.

items.note: Vadavali is a village in the Palghar district of Maharashtra, India. It is located in the Talasari taluka.
The Roman Catholic Diocese of Vasai (Latin: Vasaien(sis)) is a diocese located in the city of Vasai in the ecclesiastical province of Bombay in India.
The Dongri Fort, or the Dongri Hill Fort, locally known as the Janjire Dhavari Fort, is a fort in Mumbai, India. It is located in the Dongri area.
The Ulhas River is a west-flowing river in Maharashtra, India. It is in the Thane, Raigad, and Pune districts of that state.

Naigaon is a village in Palghar district of Indian State of Maharashtra. It is linked by the Versova Bridge /Ghodbunder Bridge to Navghar, which is connected from the east side of the settlement by the National Highway.

Bhayandar, also spelled as Bhaindar or Bhayander, is a suburb located in the western suburbs of Mumbai and the northern most suburb of the island on the western side, near the Vasai Creek. It has a large Marathi, Aagri, Koli, and mixed-community population.

Dongri is a port city in the Mira-Bhayandar municipality of Thane district, situated just north of Gorai, Mumbai. The word 'Dungaree' (worker's overalls worn in Britain) has its origin in Dongri due to this genre of garment monolithically being manufactured from textile sectors within the confines of the city.
Manickpur is a small village in the Vasai (Bassein) township of the Palghar district in the Maharashtra, India.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Fort Vasai?
faq.a: The best time to visit Fort Vasai is Oct – Mar. Summers are 26–40°C and winters are 12–28°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Fort Vasai?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Chhatrapati Shivaji Maharaj International Airport, Mumbai (27 km) and the nearest railway station is Kalyan Junction (Mumbai) (35 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Fort Vasai?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Fort Vasai at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Fort Vasai?
faq.a: Stays in Fort Vasai start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Fort Vasai?
faq.a: The top attractions are Vadavali, Diocese of Vasai, Dongri Fort, Ulhas River, Naigaon.
